title: VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION - 211info
text: TILLAMOOK COUNTY COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTERS CENTRAL COUNTY HEALTH CENTER VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childhood immunizations and some adult immunizations. Offers influenza (flu) vaccines as they become available each season, along with vaccine information. 801 Pacific Avenue Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm (503) 842-3900 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 842-3900 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance, sliding scale fees offered to uninsured patients. No child will be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Immunization record and insurance information, if available LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Tillamook County Services: Childhood Immunization Flu Vaccines Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OHP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HEALTH SERVICES SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - MEDICATION ASSISTED TREATMENT FOR SUBSTANCE USE DISORDERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TILLAMOOK COUNTY COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTERS CENTRAL COUNTY HEALTH CENTER
